displayName.italian: La ragazza con i capelli verdi

description.brazilian: Jogue com a Chloe pela primeira vez.
description.english: Play as Chloe for the First Time
description.french: Jouer en tant que Chloe pour la première fois.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal als Chloe gespielt.
description.italian: Hai giocato come Chloe per la prima volta.
description.japanese: クロエとして初めてプレイする
description.latam: Juega como Chloe por primera vez.
description.schinese: 首次扮演歌露儿
description.spanish: Has jugado como Chloe por primera vez.
description.tchinese: 第一次化身克洛伊遊玩。

description.brazilian: Jogue com a Max pela primeira vez.
description.english: Play as Max for the First Time
description.french: Jouer en tant que Max pour la première fois.
description.german: Zum ersten Mal als Max gespielt.
description.italian: Hai giocato come Max per la prima volta.
description.japanese: マックスとして初めてプレイする
description.latam: Juega como Max por primera vez.
description.schinese: 首次扮演麦珂茜
description.spanish: Has jugado como Max por primera vez.

description.brazilian: Convença a Noelle que você está visitando o campus.
description.french: Convaincre Noelle que vous visitez le campus.
description.german: Noelle überzeugt, dass du den Campus besuchst.
description.italian: Hai convinto Noelle che sei venuta a visitare il campus.
description.japanese: キャンパスに見学に来たとノエルに信じさせる
description.latam: Convence a Noelle de que estás visitando el campus.
description.russian: Убедить Ноэль, что вы приехали поступать в университет.
description.schinese: 让诺埃尔相信你是来学校参观的
description.spanish: Has convencido a Noelle de que has venido a visitar el campus.
description.tchinese: 說服諾艾爾你是來參觀校園。

description.brazilian: Reuniu a Max e a Chloe.
description.french: Réunir Max et Chloe.
description.german: Max und Chloe wiedervereint.
description.italian: Hai riunito Max e Chloe.
description.japanese: マックスとクロエを再会させた
description.latam: Reúne a Max y Chloe.
description.schinese: 让麦珂茜与歌露儿重逢
description.spanish: Max y Chloe se han reencontrado.

displayName.spanish: El frotar se va a acabar

description.brazilian: Impeça que a pichação no pátio seja removida.
description.english: Stop the Quad Graffiti From Being Removed
description.french: Empêcher le nettoyage du graffiti de la cour.
description.german: Verhindert, dass das Graffiti auf dem Hof entfernt wird.
description.italian: Hai impedito che rimuovessero il graffito in cortile.
description.japanese: 中庭の落書きが消されるのを阻止する
description.latam: Evita que quiten el grafiti del patio.
description.russian: Не дать уборщику стереть граффити во дворе.
description.schinese: 阻止学校庭院的涂鸦被清除。
description.spanish: Has impedido que borren el grafiti del patio.
description.tchinese: 阻止工人清除北院的塗鴉。

description.brazilian: Ouviu todas as poesias no evento do bar.
description.english: Listened to all of the Poetry During the Open Mic Night
description.french: Écouter tous les poèmes de la soirée Open Mic.
description.german: Alle Gedichte am Open Mic-Abend gehört.
description.italian: Hai ascoltato tutte le poesie della serata open mic.
description.japanese: 飛び入り参加デーの詩の朗読をすべて聞いた
description.koreana: 오픈 마이크 중 모든 시 낭송을 감상함
description.latam: Escucha todas las poesías en la noche de micrófono abierto.
description.russian: Послушать все стихотворения на вечере открытого микрофона.
description.schinese: 完整聆听开放麦之夜的全部诗作。
description.spanish: Has escuchado todos los poemas durante el micro abierto.
description.tchinese: 在開麥之夜聆聽所有的詩。

description.brazilian: Convença o Joey que você faz parte do protesto.
description.english: Convince Joey You’re Part of the Protest
description.french: Convaincre Joey que vous soutenez sa cause.
description.german: Joey überzeugt, dass du Teil der Protestbewegung bist.
description.italian: Hai convinto Joey che fai parte della protesta.
description.japanese: デモに参加したがっているとジョーイに信じさせる
description.latam: Convence a Joey de que estás participando en la protesta.
description.russian: Убедить Джоуи, что вы тоже участвуете в протесте.
description.schinese: 让乔伊相信你是抗议活动的一员
description.spanish: Has convencido a Joey de que formas parte de la protesta.
description.tchinese: 說服喬伊讓你參加示威活動。

description.brazilian: Fujam juntas.
description.french: Partir ensemble.
description.german: Zusammen entkommen.
description.italian: Ve ne siete andate insieme.
description.japanese: 一緒に逃げる
description.latam: Escápense juntas.
description.schinese: 一同成功脱身
description.spanish: Os habéis marchado juntas.

description.brazilian: A ameaça permanece.
description.french: La menace plane toujours.
description.german: Die Bedrohung besteht weiter.
description.italian: La minaccia persiste.
description.japanese: 危険はまだ去っていない
description.latam: La amenaza aún persiste.
description.schinese: 威胁还在暗中潜伏
description.spanish: La amenaza sigue presente.

displayName.brazilian: É um tanto... fascinante pra mim
displayName.english: It's, Uh, Kind of Fascinating to Me
displayName.latam: Es, eh, algo fascinante para mí

description.brazilian: Observe sua hóspede dormindo.
description.french: Regarder votre invitée dormir.
description.german: Deinem Gast beim Schlafen zugesehen.
description.italian: Hai guardato la tua ospite mentre dormiva.
description.japanese: 来訪者の寝ている姿を見る
description.latam: Vigila el descanso de tu invitado.
description.russian: Понаблюдать за своей гостьей во сне.
description.schinese: 看客人睡觉
description.spanish: Has observado a tu invitada mientras dormía.

displayName.schinese: 天王星失散多年的亲戚
displayName.tchinese: 天王星失散多年的遠親

description.brazilian: Ajude o Moses a escolher o nome de uma estrela.
description.french: Aider Moses à nommer une étoile.
description.german: Moses geholfen, einen Stern zu benennen.
description.italian: Hai aiutato Moses a dare un nome a un corpo celeste.
description.japanese: モーゼスの星の名前を考える
description.koreana: 모지스가 천체에 이름 지어주는 것을 도움
description.latam: Ayuda a Moses a ponerle nombre a una estrella.
description.russian: Помочь Мозесу дать название небесному телу.
description.schinese: 帮摩西为一颗星星取名
description.spanish: Has ayudado a Moses a bautizar un cuerpo celeste.
description.tchinese: 幫助摩西為一顆星星取名。

displayName.italian: La persuasione è il mio mestiere

description.brazilian: Convença o Lucas a contar detalhes sobre o protesto.
description.english: Convince Lucas to Leak Details on the Protest
description.french: Convaincre Lucas de vous révéler des détails sur la manif.
description.german: Lucas überzeugt, Details zum Protest auszuplaudern.
description.italian: Hai convinto Lucas a darti dei dettagli sulla protesta.
description.japanese: ルーカスからデモの詳細を聞き出す
description.latam: Convence a Lucas de filtrar detalles de la protesta.
description.schinese: 劝说卢卡斯透露抗议活动的细节
description.spanish: Le has sonsacado a Lucas información sobre la protesta.
description.tchinese: 說服盧卡斯透露有關示威活動的詳細資訊。

description.brazilian: Dê um presente de aniversário pra Max.
description.english: Give Max a Gift for her Birthday
description.french: Donner un cadeau d’anniversaire à Max.
description.german: Max ein Geschenk zu ihrem Geburtstag gegeben.
description.italian: Hai fatto un regalo a Max per il suo compleanno.
description.japanese: マックスに誕生日プレゼントを贈る
description.latam: Dale un regalo a Max por su cumpleaños.
description.russian: Подарить Макс что-то на день рождения.
description.schinese: 给麦珂茜送一份生日礼物
description.spanish: Le has hecho un regalo a Max por su cumpleaños.

description.brazilian: Encontre todas as evidências opcionais em uma só jogada.
description.english: Find all Pieces of Optional Evidence in Game in a Single Playthrough
description.french: Trouver tous les indices facultatifs en un seule partie.
description.german: Alle optionalen Beweisstücke in einem einzigen Durchgang gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le prove secondarie del gioco in un'unica partita.
description.japanese: クリアまでのプレイ1周で任意の証拠をすべて見つける
description.koreana: 한 회차에서 모든 추가 증거를 수집함
description.latam: Encuentra todas las piezas de evidencia opcional en el juego en una sola partida.
description.russian: Найти все необязательные улики за одно прохождение.
description.schinese: 在单次通关内集齐所有可选的证据
description.spanish: Has encontrado todos los indicios secundarios del juego en una única partida.
description.tchinese: 在單次遊玩過程中，找齊所有非必要證據。

description.brazilian: Faça o Ren admitir que sente rancor da Caledon.
description.english: Convince Ren to Admit to Having Bad Blood With Caledon
description.french: Convaincre Ren d’admettre qu’il ressent de l’animosité envers Caledon.
description.german: Ren überzeugt, zuzugeben, dass er gegenüber Caledon feindselig ist.
description.italian: Hai convinto Ren a confessare il suo odio per la Caledon.
description.japanese: カレドン大学との確執をレンに認めさせる
description.koreana: 렌에게 칼레돈과 사이가 좋지 않음을 설득함
description.latam: Convence a Ren de admitir que le tiene odio a Caledon.
description.russian: Заставить Рена признаться, что он таит злобу на Каледон.
description.schinese: 说服阿雷承认自己与卡利登积怨已久
description.spanish: Has hecho que Ren confiese su odio hacia Caledon.
description.tchinese: 說服雷恩承認他與卡利登有血仇。

description.brazilian: Impediu o incêndio jogando com a Chloe.
description.french: Arrêter l’incendie en tant que Chloe.
description.german: Das Feuer als Chloe aufgehalten.
description.italian: Hai fermato l'incendio nei panni di Chloe.
description.japanese: クロエが火事を防いだ
description.latam: Detén el incendio como Chloe.
description.schinese: 扮演歌露儿阻止火灾
description.spanish: Has parado el incendio como Chloe.

description.brazilian: Impediu o incêndio jogando com a Max.
description.french: Arrêter l’incendie en tant que Max.
description.german: Das Feuer als Max aufgehalten.
description.italian: Hai fermato l'incendio nei panni di Max.
description.japanese: マックスが火事を防いだ
description.latam: Detén el incendio como Max.
description.schinese: 扮演麦珂茜阻止火灾
description.spanish: Has parado el incendio como Max.

description.brazilian: Concluiu Life is Strange: Reunion
description.french: Terminer Life is Strange: Reunion.
description.german: Life is Strange: Reunion abgeschlossen.
description.italian: Hai finito Life is Strange: Reunion.
description.japanese: 『ライフ・イズ・ストレンジ リユニオン』をクリアした
description.latam: Completaste Life is Strange: Reunion
description.russian: Пройти Life is Strange: Reunion до конца.
description.schinese: 通关《奇异人生：重逢》
description.spanish: Has terminado Life is Strange: Reunion.

description.brazilian: Escutou todos os podcasts.
description.french: Écouter tous les podcasts.
description.german: Alle Podcasts angehört.
description.italian: Hai ascoltato tutti i podcast.
description.japanese: すべてのポッドキャストを聞いた
description.latam: Escucha todos los pódcast.
description.schinese: 听完所有播客
description.spanish: Has escuchado todos los pódcasts.

description.brazilian: Salvou todas as pessoas possíveis.
description.french: Sauver tout le monde.
description.german: Alle gerettet, die du retten konntest.
description.italian: Hai salvato tutte le persone possibili.
description.japanese: 救える人を全員救った
description.koreana: 구조할 수 있는 모든 인물을 구조함
description.latam: Salva a todas las personas posibles.
description.schinese: 拯救所有能被救下的人
description.spanish: Has salvado a toda la gente posible.

displayName.japanese: レーザーライトショー！

description.brazilian: Compartilhe um momento especial com a Chloe e o Moses.
description.english: Share a Special Moment With Chloe and Moses
description.french: Partager un moment spécial avec Chloe et Moses.
description.german: Einen besonderen Moment mit Chloe und Moses geteilt.
description.italian: Hai condiviso un momento speciale con Chloe e Moses.
description.japanese: クロエとモーゼスと一緒に特別な時間を過ごす
description.koreana: 클로이, 모지스와 함께 특별한 순간을 보냄
description.latam: Comparte un momento especial con Chloe y Moses.
description.russian: Весело провести время с Хлоей и Мозесом.
description.schinese: 和歌露儿、摩西一同度过难忘的瞬间
description.spanish: Has compartido un momento especial con Chloe y Moses.
description.tchinese: 與克洛伊和摩西分享特別的時刻。

description.brazilian: Encontrou todos os itens colecionáveis da Max.
description.french: Trouver tous les objets à collectionner pour Max.
description.german: Alle Sammelobjekte für Max gefunden.

description.japanese: マックスのコレクションをすべて見つけた
description.latam: Halla todos los coleccionables para Max.
description.schinese: 集齐麦珂茜的所有收藏品

description.schinese: 集齐所有收藏品

description.brazilian: Vença todos os Bate-bocas em uma só jogada.
description.english: Won all Backtalk Encounters on a Single Playthrough
description.french: Remporter tous les défis Insolence en une seule partie.
description.german: Alle Widerworte-Begegnungen in einem einzigen Durchgang gewonnen.
description.italian: Hai vinto tutte le sfide d'insolenza in un'unica partita.
description.japanese: クリアまでのプレイ1周ですべてのバックトークに勝利した
description.koreana: 게임 한 회차 안에 모든 말싸움에서 승리함

description.russian: Победить во всех перепалках за одно прохождение.
description.schinese: 在单次通关中赢下所有顶嘴环节
description.spanish: Has superado todos los desafíos de insolencias en una única partida.
description.tchinese: 在單次遊玩過程中，吵贏所有人。

description.brazilian: Salvou a Safi.
description.french: Sauver Safi.
description.german: Safi gerettet.
description.italian: Hai salvato Safi.
description.japanese: サフィを救った
description.latam: Salva a Safi.
description.schinese: 救下萨菲
description.spanish: Has salvado a Safi.

displayName.italian: La ragazza con i capelli blu

description.brazilian: Completou o jogo como a Chloe que Max salvou.
description.english: Completed the Game as the Chloe who Max Saved
description.french: Terminer le jeu en choisissant de sauver Chloe.
description.german: Das Spiel als Chloe, die Arcadia Bay überlebte, abgeschlossen.
description.italian: Hai finito il gioco scegliendo di salvare Chloe.
description.japanese: 嵐を生き延びたクロエでゲームをクリアした
description.latam: Termina el juego como la Chloe que Max salvó.
description.russian: Пройти игру, ответив, что вы пожертвовали Аркадией-Бэй.
description.schinese: 以“拯救歌露儿线”歌露儿通关游戏。
description.spanish: Has terminado el juego como Chloe, la que sobrevivió.
description.tchinese: 化身「被拯救的克洛伊」通關遊戲。

displayName.japanese: デッド・ガール・ウォーキング

description.brazilian: Completou o jogo como a Chloe que morreu em Arcadia Bay.
description.english: Completed the Game as the Chloe who Died in Arcadia Bay
description.french: Terminer le jeu en choisissant de sauver Arcadia Bay.
description.german: Das Spiel als Chloe, die in Arcadia Bay starb, abgeschlossen.
description.italian: Hai finito il gioco scegliendo di salvare Arcadia Bay.
description.japanese: 嵐で死亡したクロエでゲームをクリアした
description.latam: Termina el juego como la Chloe que murió en Arcadia Bay.
description.russian: Пройти игру, ответив, что вы пожертвовали Хлоей.
description.schinese: 以“拯救小镇线”歌露儿通关游戏。
description.spanish: Has terminado el juego como Chloe, la que murió.
description.tchinese: 化身「被放棄的克洛伊」通關遊戲。

displayName.spanish: A la una, a las dos...

description.brazilian: Dê o maior lance no leilão silencioso.
description.english: Win the Silent Auction Bidding War
description.french: Remporter les enchères silencieuses.
description.german: Den Bieterkrieg in der stillen Auktion gewonnen.
description.italian: Hai vinto l'asta silenziosa.
description.japanese: 入札式オークションを勝ち抜く
description.latam: Gana la guerra de ofertas de la subasta silenciosa.
description.schinese: 在无声拍卖中胜出
description.spanish: Has hecho la puja más alta en la subasta silenciosa.
